items.title: Blocky
items.description: A privacy-first, installable block-stacking game. Colorblind-safe palette, high contrast, reduce motion, and Shape KAOS difficulty decks. Zero tracking, zero accounts, works offline once installed.

items.title: Draggy
items.description: A dragon arena grow-and-avoid game. Dragon identity is shape-based (crest silhouette), not just color, for genuine colorblind accessibility. Installable, offline-capable, no tracking.

items.title: Squishy
items.description: A jelly-bubble stacking game where every piece has eyes that follow your touch and squishes as it dances. Built on the same privacy-first engine as Blocky.
